a:r.a:t: AR Intelligence – Hack and build Phase
Integrating AR Intelligent solution into the CFO's value chain to elevate AR from a standard operation to drive proactive, data-driven insights.
High effort to capture liquidity snapshots and cash movement based on AR Activities
Automated AR vs GL variance view
Net due date-based aging of invoices
Customer aging risk view with prioritization ADP, ADL
Net due date-based aging of invoices
Collector follow up based on self
Collector follow up based on self
Provide clean AR data for consolidation system
Continuous KPI tracking enabling proactive intervention
ML-driven insights to refine collection prioritization based on payment behavior scoring
Reduction of revenue leakage via trend-based controls
Realtime DSO & overdue KPI tracking via SAC dashboard enabling proactive intervention
